creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I had forgotten about this bug report.  The report should be closed, I
figured out the problem after the fact.  I used to have portupgrade rebuild
nvidia-driver after xorg-libraries was done because of libglx.so needing to
be replaced with the NVidia version.  The libglx.so file wasn't getting
installed by xorg-libraries anymore, but by libGL.  I modified pkgtools.conf
to reflect that.  Sorry for letting this stay open for so long when it
wasn't an issue anymore.

Naram Qashat
